name: US coastal DEM conversational smoke tests
purpose: Exercise CelerisAgent chat state, LLM spatial interpretation, source routing, and UI rendering across varied US coastal locations.

cases.place: Waikiki Beach / Ala Wai Boat Harbor, Honolulu, HI
turns: Could you make me a coastal DEM for waikiki, maybe by the boat harbor?
I forgot the size - use about 800 m by 800 m, centered around the Ala Wai boat harbor entrance. Native datum/res is fine.
Actually bias it a little offshore so the beach and harbor entrance are both visible.
cases.expected_focus: State carryover from informal Waikiki request, fuzzy harbor entrance center, and offshore spatial correction.

turns: Need a DEM for Cannon bech Oregon near Haystack rock.
Let's do a 1 km square domain. I don't care about resampling, keep native source resolution.
Center it so Haystack Rock is in the lower half and there is ocean on the west side.
cases.expected_focus: Typo in place name, missing domain on first turn, final conversational footprint correction.

turns: Create a coastal DEM for Monterey harbor by Fishermans wharf.
Use a roughly 900 meter by 900 meter domain, but don't force it to 5m. native grid is ok.
If the first center is too far inland, move it toward the harbor mouth.
cases.expected_focus: Named harbor request, native-resolution policy, and relative correction toward harbor mouth.

turns: Can we build a DEM for Galviston beach around Pleasure Pier?
Target area is about 1 km x 1 km. Put the pier near the center.
The Gulf side matters most; if needed shift the grid seaward.
cases.expected_focus: Typo in Galveston, source routing outside the West Coast, and seaward correction.

cases.place: South Beach / Government Cut, Miami Beach, FL
turns: I want a DEM for south beach Miami near Gov cut.
Make it a 1 km by 1 km coastal box, centered near the beach side of Government Cut.
Use whatever vertical datum the source has, just make sure the inlet/ocean entrance is included.
cases.expected_focus: Abbreviated feature name, missing datum, and final inlet/ocean footprint inclusion.

cases.place: Duck Pier / USACE Field Research Facility, Duck, NC
turns: Make a coastal DEM for Duck NC near the pier.
Oops, I mean the research pier / field research facility. Use about 1 km square.
Center it on the shoreline with enough offshore area for incoming waves.
cases.expected_focus: Conversational correction of feature name and shoreline/offshore AOI reasoning.
